global.description: The ad features a clean and modern design with a focus on the brand and its message.
global.main_message: Promoting financial clarity and peace of mind.

elements.label: green abstract background
elements.description: A smooth green background with abstract shapes and gradients.

elements.label: large square shape
elements.description: A prominent square shape in the center, filled with a lighter shade of green.

elements.label: oval shape
elements.description: An oval shape overlapping the square, adding visual interest.

elements.label: rectangle shape
elements.description: A rectangle shape positioned near the center, contrasting with the other elements.

elements.label: small circle
elements.description: A small circle located at the top, serving as a decorative icon.

elements.label: arrow icon
elements.description: A small arrow icon positioned at the top right, indicating direction.

elements.label: call to action button
elements.description: A rectangular button at the bottom with rounded edges, inviting interaction.

elements.label: text block
elements.description: A small text block positioned near the center, providing additional information.

elements.label: main headline
elements.description: A bold headline at the top, prominently displaying the brand name 'CoinBridge'.

elements.label: supporting text
elements.description: A larger text block at the bottom, conveying the message 'Your money, clearer Built for peace of mind'.
elements.text_content: Your money, clearer Built for peace of mind

elements.label: book now button
elements.description: A smaller call to action button at the bottom, encouraging users to 'Book now'.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main subject is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
